dropped.name: perseus.hermes_run
dropped.ddl:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW perseus.hermes_run AS
SELECT r.experiment_id,
    r.local_id AS run_id,
    r.description,
    r.created_on,
    r.strain,
    r.max_yield AS yield,
    r.max_titer AS titer,
    rg.id AS result_goo_id,
    ig.id AS feedstock_goo_id,
    c.id AS container_id,
    r.start_time AS run_on,
    r.stop_time AS duration
   FROM hermes.run r
     LEFT JOIN goo rg ON ('m'::text || rg.id::text) = r.resultant_material::text
     LEFT JOIN goo ig ON ('m'::text || ig.id::text) = r.feedstock_material::text
     LEFT JOIN container c ON c.uid::text = r.tank::text
  WHERE (COALESCE(r.feedstock_material, ''::character varying)::text <> ''::text OR COALESCE(r.resultant_material, ''::character varying)::text <> ''::text) AND COALESCE(r.feedstock_material, ''::character varying)::text <> COALESCE(r.resultant_material, ''::character varying)::text;

dropped.name: perseus.combined_sp_field_map_display_type
dropped.ddl:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW perseus.combined_sp_field_map_display_type AS
SELECT sp.id + 10000 + dl.id AS id,
    sp.id + 20000 AS field_map_id,
    dl.id AS display_type_id,
    ('getPollValueBySmurfPropertyId('::text || sp.id::text) || ')'::text AS display,
    5 AS display_layout_id,
    0 AS manditory
   FROM smurf_property sp
     JOIN smurf s ON s.id = sp.smurf_id
     JOIN property p ON p.id = sp.property_id
     CROSS JOIN display_layout dl
  WHERE sp.disabled = 0 AND dl.id = 1
UNION
 SELECT sp.id + 20000 + dl.id AS id,
    sp.id + 20000 AS field_map_id,
    dl.id AS display_type_id,
    ('getPollValueBySmurfPropertyId('::text || sp.id::text) || ')'::text AS display,
    7 AS display_layout_id,
    0 AS manditory
   FROM smurf_property sp
     JOIN smurf s ON s.id = sp.smurf_id
     JOIN property p ON p.id = sp.property_id
     CROSS JOIN display_layout dl
  WHERE sp.disabled = 0 AND dl.id = 7
UNION
 SELECT sp.id + 30000 + dl.id AS id,
    sp.id + 30000 AS field_map_id,
    dl.id AS display_type_id,
    ('getPollValueStringBySmurfPropertyId('::text || sp.id::text) || ')'::text AS display,
    7 AS display_layout_id,
    0 AS manditory
   FROM smurf_property sp
     JOIN smurf s ON s.id = sp.smurf_id
     JOIN property p ON p.id = sp.property_id
     CROSS JOIN display_layout dl
  WHERE sp.disabled = 0 AND dl.id = 3
UNION
 SELECT sp.id + 40000 + dl.id AS id,
    sp.id + 30000 AS field_map_id,
    dl.id AS display_type_id,
    ('getPollValueStringBySmurfPropertyId('::text || sp.id::text) || ')'::text AS display,
    7 AS display_layout_id,
    0 AS manditory
   FROM smurf_property sp
     JOIN smurf s ON s.id = sp.smurf_id
     JOIN property p ON p.id = sp.property_id
     CROSS JOIN display_layout dl
  WHERE sp.disabled = 0 AND dl.id = 6
UNION
 SELECT sp.id + 50000 + dl.id AS id,
    sp.id + 40000 AS field_map_id,
    dl.id AS display_type_id,
    ('getPollValueBySmurfPropertyId('::text || sp.id::text) || ')'::text AS display,
    5 AS display_layout_id,
    0 AS manditory
   FROM smurf_property sp
     JOIN smurf s ON s.id = sp.smurf_id
     JOIN property p ON p.id = sp.property_id
     CROSS JOIN display_layout dl
  WHERE sp.disabled = 0 AND dl.id = 1;

dropped.name: perseus.combined_field_map_display_type
dropped.ddl:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW perseus.combined_field_map_display_type AS
SELECT field_map_display_type.id,

    field_map_display_type.display_type_id,
    field_map_display_type.display,
    field_map_display_type.display_layout_id,
    field_map_display_type.manditory
   FROM field_map_display_type
UNION
 SELECT combined_sp_field_map_display_type.id,
    combined_sp_field_map_display_type.field_map_id,
    combined_sp_field_map_display_type.display_type_id,
    combined_sp_field_map_display_type.display,
    combined_sp_field_map_display_type.display_layout_id,
    combined_sp_field_map_display_type.manditory
   FROM combined_sp_field_map_display_type;

dropped.name: perseus.vw_lot
dropped.ddl:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW perseus.vw_lot AS
SELECT m.id,
    m.uid,
    m.name,
    m.description,
    m.goo_type_id AS material_type_id,
    p.id AS process_id,
    p.uid AS process_uid,
    p.name AS process_name,
    p.description AS process_description,
    p.smurf_id AS process_type_id,
    p.run_on,
    p.duration,
        CASE
            WHEN p.container_id IS NOT NULL THEN p.container_id
            ELSE m.container_id
        END AS container_id,
    m.original_volume,
    m.original_mass,
    m.triton_task_id,
    m.recipe_id,
    m.recipe_part_id,
        CASE
            WHEN m.manufacturer_id IS NULL THEN p.organization_id
            ELSE m.manufacturer_id
        END AS manufacturer_id,
    p.themis_sample_id,
    m.catalog_label,
    m.added_on AS created_on,
    m.added_by AS created_by_id
   FROM goo m
     LEFT JOIN transition_material tm ON tm.material_id::text = m.uid::text
     LEFT JOIN fatsmurf p ON tm.transition_id::text = p.uid::text;

dropped.name: perseus.vw_process_upstream
dropped.ddl:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW perseus.vw_process_upstream AS
SELECT tm.transition_id AS source_process,
    mt.transition_id AS destination_process,
    fs.smurf_id AS source_process_type,
    fs2.smurf_id AS destination_process_type,
    mt.material_id AS connecting_material
   FROM material_transition mt
     JOIN transition_material tm ON tm.material_id::text = mt.material_id::text
     JOIN fatsmurf fs ON mt.transition_id::text = fs.uid::text
     JOIN fatsmurf fs2 ON tm.transition_id::text = fs2.uid::text;

dropped.name: perseus.vw_fermentation_upstream
dropped.ddl:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW perseus.vw_fermentation_upstream AS
WITH RECURSIVE fermentation_chain AS (
         SELECT pt.destination_process AS start_point,
            pt.destination_process AS parent,
            pt.destination_process_type AS process_type,
            pt.source_process AS child,
            '/'::text || pt.destination_process::text AS path,
            1 AS level
           FROM vw_process_upstream pt
          WHERE pt.source_process_type = 22
        UNION ALL
         SELECT r.start_point,
            pt.destination_process,
            pt.destination_process_type AS process_type,
            pt.source_process,
                CASE
                    WHEN pt.destination_process_type = 22 THEN (r.path || '/'::text) || pt.source_process::text
                    ELSE r.path
                END AS path,
                CASE
                    WHEN pt.destination_process_type = 22 THEN r.level + 1
                    ELSE r.level
                END AS level
           FROM vw_process_upstream pt
             JOIN fermentation_chain r ON pt.destination_process::text = r.child::text
          WHERE pt.destination_process::text <> pt.source_process::text
        ) CYCLE child SET is_cycle USING path_array
 SELECT start_point,
    child AS end_point,
    path,
    level
   FROM fermentation_chain
  WHERE process_type = 22 AND NOT is_cycle;

dropped.name: perseus.vw_lot_edge
dropped.ddl:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW perseus.vw_lot_edge AS
SELECT sl.id AS src_lot_id,
    dl.id AS dst_lot_id,
    mt.added_on AS created_on
   FROM material_transition mt
     JOIN vw_lot sl ON sl.uid::text = mt.material_id::text
     JOIN vw_lot dl ON dl.process_uid::text = mt.transition_id::text;

dropped.name: perseus.vw_lot_path
dropped.ddl:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW perseus.vw_lot_path AS
SELECT sl.id AS src_lot_id,
    dl.id AS dst_lot_id,
    mu.path,
    mu.level AS length
   FROM m_upstream mu
     JOIN vw_lot sl ON sl.uid::text = mu.end_point::text
     JOIN vw_lot dl ON dl.uid::text = mu.start_point::text;

dropped.name: perseus.vw_recipe_prep
dropped.ddl:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW perseus.vw_recipe_prep AS
SELECT id,
    name,
    material_type_id,
    container_id,
    recipe_id,
    triton_task_id,
    original_volume AS volume_l,
    original_mass AS mass_kg,
    created_on,
    created_by_id
   FROM vw_lot prep
  WHERE recipe_id IS NOT NULL AND process_type_id = 207;

dropped.name: perseus.vw_recipe_prep_part
dropped.ddl:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW perseus.vw_recipe_prep_part AS
SELECT split.id,
    r.id AS recipe_id,
    rp.id AS recipe_part_id,
    prep.id AS prep_id,
    rp.goo_type_id AS expected_material_type_id,
    split.material_type_id AS actual_material_type_id,
    src.id AS source_lot_id,
    split.original_volume AS volume_l,
    split.original_mass AS mass_kg,
    split.created_on,
    split.created_by_id
   FROM vw_lot split
     JOIN vw_lot_edge split_to_prep ON split_to_prep.src_lot_id = split.id
     JOIN vw_lot prep ON prep.id = split_to_prep.dst_lot_id
     JOIN vw_lot_edge src_to_split ON src_to_split.dst_lot_id = split.id
     JOIN vw_lot src ON src.id = src_to_split.src_lot_id
     JOIN recipe r ON r.id = prep.recipe_id
     JOIN recipe_part rp ON rp.id = split.recipe_part_id AND r.id = rp.recipe_id
  WHERE split.recipe_part_id IS NOT NULL AND prep.recipe_id IS NOT NULL AND split.process_type_id = 110 AND prep.process_type_id = 207;

dropped.name: perseus.combined_field_map

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW perseus.combined_field_map AS
SELECT field_map.id,

    field_map.display_order,
    field_map.setter,
    field_map.lookup,

    field_map.nullable,

    field_map.database_id,
    field_map.save_sequence,
    field_map.onchange,
    field_map.field_map_set_id
   FROM field_map
UNION
 SELECT combined_sp_field_map.id,
    combined_sp_field_map.field_map_block_id,
    combined_sp_field_map.name,
    combined_sp_field_map.description,
    combined_sp_field_map.display_order,
    combined_sp_field_map.setter,
    combined_sp_field_map.lookup,
    combined_sp_field_map.lookup_service,
    combined_sp_field_map.nullable,
    combined_sp_field_map.field_map_type_id,
    combined_sp_field_map.database_id,
    combined_sp_field_map.save_sequence,
    combined_sp_field_map.onchange,
    combined_sp_field_map.field_map_set_id
   FROM combined_sp_field_map;

dropped.name: perseus.combined_field_map_block
dropped.ddl:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW perseus.combined_field_map_block AS
SELECT field_map_block.id,
    field_map_block.filter,
    field_map_block.scope
   FROM field_map_block
UNION
 SELECT smurf.id + 1000 AS id,
    ('isSmurf('::text || smurf.id::text) || ')'::text AS filter,
    'FatSmurfReading'::character varying AS scope
   FROM smurf
UNION
 SELECT smurf.id + 2000 AS id,
    ('isSmurf('::text || smurf.id::text) || ')'::text AS filter,
    'FatSmurf'::character varying AS scope
   FROM smurf
UNION
 SELECT smurf.id + 3000 AS id,
    ('isSmurfWithOneReading('::text || smurf.id::text) || ')'::text AS filter,
    'FatSmurf'::character varying AS scope
   FROM smurf;

dropped.name: perseus.vw_tom_perseus_sample_prep_materials

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW perseus.vw_tom_perseus_sample_prep_materials AS
SELECT ds.end_point AS material_id
   FROM goo g
     JOIN m_downstream ds ON ds.start_point::text = g.uid::text
  WHERE g.goo_type_id = ANY (ARRAY[40, 62])
UNION
 SELECT g.uid AS material_id
   FROM goo g
  WHERE g.goo_type_id = ANY (ARRAY[40, 62]);

dropped.name: perseus.translated
dropped.ddl:
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW perseus.translated AS
SELECT mt.material_id AS source_material,
    tm.material_id AS destination_material,
    mt.transition_id
   FROM material_transition mt
     JOIN transition_material tm ON tm.transition_id::text = mt.transition_id::text;

dropped.name: perseus.vw_material_transition_material_up

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW perseus.vw_material_transition_material_up AS
SELECT mt.material_id AS source_uid,

   FROM transition_material tm

dropped.name: perseus.downstream
dropped.ddl:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW perseus.downstream AS
WITH RECURSIVE downstream AS (
         SELECT pt.source_material AS start_point,
            pt.source_material AS parent,
            pt.destination_material AS child,
            '/'::character varying(4000) AS path,
            1 AS level
           FROM translated pt
        UNION ALL
         SELECT r.start_point,
            pt.source_material,
            pt.destination_material,
            (((r.path::text || r.child::text) || '/'::text))::character varying(4000) AS "varchar",
            r.level + 1
           FROM translated pt
             JOIN downstream r ON pt.source_material::text = r.child::text
          WHERE pt.source_material::text <> pt.destination_material::text
        ) CYCLE start_point, child SET is_cycle USING cycle_path
 SELECT start_point,
    child AS end_point,
    path,
    level
   FROM downstream
  WHERE NOT is_cycle;

dropped.name: perseus.material_transition_material
dropped.ddl:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW perseus.material_transition_material AS
SELECT source_material AS start_point,
    transition_id,
    destination_material AS end_point
   FROM translated;

dropped.name: perseus.upstream
dropped.ddl:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW perseus.upstream AS
WITH RECURSIVE upstream AS (
         SELECT pt.destination_material AS start_point,
            pt.destination_material AS parent,
            pt.source_material AS child,
            '/'::text AS path,
            1 AS level
           FROM translated pt
        UNION ALL
         SELECT r.start_point,
            pt.destination_material AS parent,
            pt.source_material AS child,
            (r.path || r.child::text) || '/'::text AS path,
            r.level + 1 AS level
           FROM translated pt
             JOIN upstream r ON pt.destination_material::text = r.child::text
          WHERE pt.destination_material::text <> pt.source_material::text
        ) CYCLE child SET is_cycle USING path_array
 SELECT start_point,
    child AS end_point,
    path,
    level
   FROM upstream
  WHERE NOT is_cycle;

dropped.name: perseus.combined_sp_field_map
dropped.ddl:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW perseus.combined_sp_field_map AS
SELECT sp.id + 20000 AS id,
    sp.smurf_id + 1000 AS field_map_block_id,
    p.name::text ||
        CASE
            WHEN u.name IS NOT NULL THEN (' ('::text || u.name::text) || ')'::text
            ELSE ''::text
        END AS name,
    NULL::text AS description,
    sp.sort_order AS display_order,
    ('setPollValueBySpid('::text || sp.id::text) || ', ?)'::text AS setter,
        CASE
            WHEN po.property_id IS NULL THEN NULL::text
            ELSE ('PropertyPeer::getLookupByPropertyId('::text || po.property_id::text) || ')'::text
        END AS lookup,
    NULL::text AS lookup_service,
    1 AS nullable,
        CASE
            WHEN po.property_id IS NOT NULL THEN 12
            ELSE 10
        END AS field_map_type_id,
    NULL::text AS database_id,
    1 AS save_sequence,
    NULL::text AS onchange,
        CASE
            WHEN s.class_id = 2 THEN 9
            ELSE 12
        END AS field_map_set_id
   FROM smurf_property sp
     JOIN smurf s ON sp.smurf_id = s.id
     JOIN property p ON sp.property_id = p.id
     LEFT JOIN unit u ON u.id = p.unit_id
     LEFT JOIN property_option po ON po.property_id = p.id
UNION
 SELECT sp.id + 30000 AS id,
    sp.smurf_id + 2000 AS field_map_block_id,
    p.name::text ||
        CASE
            WHEN u.name IS NOT NULL THEN (' ('::text || u.name::text) || ')'::text
            ELSE ''::text
        END AS name,
    NULL::text AS description,
    sp.sort_order AS display_order,
    NULL::text AS setter,
    NULL::text AS lookup,
    NULL::text AS lookup_service,
    1 AS nullable,
        CASE
            WHEN po.property_id IS NOT NULL THEN 12
            ELSE 10
        END AS field_map_type_id,
    NULL::text AS database_id,
    2 AS save_sequence,
    NULL::text AS onchange,
        CASE
            WHEN s.class_id = 2 THEN 9
            ELSE 12
        END AS field_map_set_id
   FROM smurf_property sp
     JOIN smurf s ON sp.smurf_id = s.id
     JOIN property p ON sp.property_id = p.id
     LEFT JOIN unit u ON u.id = p.unit_id
     LEFT JOIN property_option po ON po.property_id = p.id
UNION
 SELECT sp.id + 40000 AS id,
    sp.smurf_id + 3000 AS field_map_block_id,
    p.name::text ||
        CASE
            WHEN u.name IS NOT NULL THEN (' ('::text || u.name::text) || ')'::text
            ELSE ''::text
        END AS name,
    NULL::text AS description,
    sp.sort_order AS display_order,
    ('setPollValueBySpid('::text || sp.id::text) || ', ?)'::text AS setter,
        CASE
            WHEN po.property_id IS NULL THEN NULL::text
            ELSE ('PropertyPeer::getLookupByPropertyId('::text || po.property_id::text) || ')'::text
        END AS lookup,
    NULL::text AS lookup_service,
    1 AS nullable,
        CASE
            WHEN po.property_id IS NOT NULL THEN 12
            ELSE 10
        END AS field_map_type_id,
    NULL::text AS database_id,
    2 AS save_sequence,
    NULL::text AS onchange,
        CASE
            WHEN s.class_id = 2 THEN 9
            ELSE 12
        END AS field_map_set_id
   FROM smurf_property sp
     JOIN smurf s ON sp.smurf_id = s.id
     JOIN property p ON sp.property_id = p.id
     LEFT JOIN unit u ON u.id = p.unit_id
     LEFT JOIN property_option po ON po.property_id = p.id;

dropped.name: perseus.vw_processable_logs
dropped.ddl:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW perseus.vw_processable_logs AS
SELECT rl.id,
    rl.class_id,
    rl.source,
    rl.created_on,
    rl.log_text,
    rl.file_name,
    rl.robot_log_checksum,
    rl.started_on,
    rl.completed_on,
    rl.loaded_on,
    rl.loaded,
    rl.loadable,
    rl.robot_run_id,
    rl.robot_log_type_id
   FROM robot_log rl
     JOIN robot_log_type rlt ON rlt.id = rl.robot_log_type_id
  WHERE COALESCE(rl.loaded, 0) = 0 AND NOT (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM robot_log_error rle
             JOIN robot_log rl_c ON rle.robot_log_id = rl_c.id
          WHERE rl_c.robot_run_id = rl.robot_run_id)) AND (rl.id IN ( SELECT min(rl_d.id) AS min
           FROM robot_log rl_d
          GROUP BY rl_d.robot_log_checksum)) AND ((EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM robot_log_read rlr
          WHERE rlr.robot_log_id = rl.id)) OR (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM robot_log_transfer rltr
          WHERE rltr.robot_log_id = rl.id))) AND COALESCE(rl.loadable, 0) = 1 AND rl.created_on > (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - '1 mon'::interval);
